title: Midnight Tango Chicken
description: A fusion of rich flavors from Midnight and Tango, this dish is a perfect blend of spices and herbs.

ingredients.name: Tango seasoning
ingredients.notes: or substitute with chili powder and cumin

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Midnight oil, Tango seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken breast to the bowl and toss to coat.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook for 5-6 minutes per side.
Transfer the chicken to a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
In the same skillet, add the diced onion, garlic, bell pepper, and tomato.
Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5-7 minutes.
Serve the chicken with the sautéed vegetables.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro, if desired.
